item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-033","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":null,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":null,"over_forced_verdict":null,"rationale":"The assistant explicitly refuses to add a third rule, redirects upstream to task definition/failure conditions/examples, and proposes subtraction or equal replacement. Although it drafts replacement text, it frames it as a brake and replacement rather than simply adding another rule, so the fail signal is not observed."}
